heading: AI Integrations
body:
You can integrate MongoDB with AI technologies to
build generative AI and AI-powered applications.
Notable integrations include:

- [LangChain](langchain)

- [LangGraph](langgraph)

- [LlamaIndex](llamaindex)

- [Semantic Kernel](semantic-kernel)

- [Haystack](haystack)

- [Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Base](amazon-bedrock)

- [Google Cloud Vertex AI](google-vertex-ai)

To learn more, see [MongoDB AI Integrations](vector-search-integrations).
